tracks.meaning: a distinct part or division of the body, such as a section of the spine or intestines
a distinct area or region of land, especially one with defined boundaries
a distinct numbered part of a legal document, statute, or contract
a small tactical unit of soldiers, typically consisting of 8-12 personnel
a distinct department or division within an organization
a contiguous block of data or memory allocated for a specific purpose
a distinct compartment or area used for organizing or keeping items
a distinct part of a newspaper or magazine dealing with a particular subject
a cross-section view or diagram showing the interior arrangement of a structure
a thin slice or cross-section of material cut or taken from a larger whole
the act of cutting or dividing something into distinct parts
a group of orchestral instruments of the same type, such as the string section
a thin slice of tissue or organism prepared for microscopic examination
